channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish coming out of bins, 16th March
item.description:
The house on the corner of battle road and Ashbourne Road never recycle correctly therefore the rubbish collection guys do not take their bins. The rubbish then over flows and comes out on the street, u could argue this then becomes fly tipping. Please could the council remind the tenants and landlord about recycling Please could current bins be emptied as food is now over the pavements Thank u

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battle Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping as always, 16th March
item.description:
Self explanatory

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly topping as always, 16th March
item.description:
Self explanatory

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tip rubbish, 16th March
item.description:
Pillow thing has been there for a few days. Now a large bin and bags have appeared

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, White Horse Hill, Coldharbour, Greater London

item.title: Paint spillage & dog poo, 16th March
item.description:
Paint splattered all over allweyway. Also a lot of dog poo in alleyway

Household items / bin bags dumped

item.title: Pothole formed where Oakley Road joins Bromley Common, 16th March
item.description:
Pothole must be recent, but will cause an issue if not addressed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakley Road, Keston Mark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big potholes, many of them on Brunswick Park road, 16th March
item.description:
These potholes have been present for several years and have significantly worsened over the past few weeks. They have expanded in size and depth and now pose a serious hazard to both drivers and cyclists. They are causing damage to vehicles and create a high risk of accidents, particularly when drivers encounter them at speed or in low visibility conditions at night. I urge the council to inspect and repair this section of road as soon as possible to prevent potential damage or injury
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 179, Brunswick Park Road, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Bin Bags Dumped, 16th March
item.description:
Noticed these bags this morning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A, Littlejohn Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continued rubbish and fly tipping, 16th March
item.description:
I do feel that the metal bins are broken and just provide another place to dump rubbish. Can they please be dismantled and cleaned up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180-182, Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in in front of communal gardens, 16th March
item.description:
Household material dumped in front of flats 14 and 15 Stane way. Please can these be removed. This is becoming a usual occurrence in this area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stane Way, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep pot hole, 16th March
item.description:
There is a very deep pot hole at the start of the road where the children cross for school and cars swerving to miss pot hole as it will pop a tyre how deep it is

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A disassembled bed flytipped, 16th March
item.description:
An old bed futon bed has been left against the wall of an area where there is frequent fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thistlewaite Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Hole around drain cover, 16th March
item.description:
This has been an open hole for several months and risks someone falling.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke

item.title: 2 large bags littering Kyd Brook., 16th March
item.description:
Two large bags are stuck in Kyd Brook. One of them is a large garden/building waste bag. I noticed them following the windy weather week commencing 9 March 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left behind barriers, 16th March
item.description:
The council fixed the man hole cover and ne ver took the barrier away its been here for about a year constantly blowing over and blocking the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nelson Mandela Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 60 Cambridge road nw6 5gs, 16th March
item.description:
Front door of property/ bin disposal and was vandalised. Bins have been placed on streets. Reoccurrence of rubbish on the floor blocking foot path and increasing rats.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)
